title: 10 common component architecture mistakes in Figma design systems (and what to do instead) - zeroheight
description: Alice Packard breaks down 10 Figma component architecture mistakes to avoid and how to fix them for a stronger design system.

title: Disgruntled researcher releases two more Microsoft zero-days

title: Microsoft Warns of Exchange Server Zero-Day Exploited in the Wild - SecurityWeek
description: Microsoft is working to patch CVE-2026-42897, an Exchange Server zero-day vulnerability that has been exploited in attacks.

title: Microsoft Windows 11 Exploited 3 Times In 24 Hours By Zero-Day Hackers
description: Microsoft Windows 11 has fallen victim to three zero-day exploits in a single day as the 2026 Pwn2Own hacking event opens in Berlin.

title: New Linux 'Dirty Frag' Zero-Day Gives Root On All Major Distros - Slashdot
description: mrspoonsi shares a report:  Dirty Frag is a vulnerability class, first discovered and reported by Hyunwoo Kim (@v4bel), that can obtain root privileges on major Linux distributions
